summary: Iteration 12: Tested SportLyo logo replacement on Login/Register pages and Organizer Dashboard redesign. All features working correctly - logos display /logo-auth.png, dashboard shows animated card grid (not table) with all action buttons.
passed_tests: UI Test 1: Login page logo - img tag with src='/logo-auth.png' and data-testid='login-logo' - PASSED
UI Test 2: Login page logo image loads correctly (naturalWidth > 0) - PASSED
UI Test 3: Register page logo - img tag with src='/logo-auth.png' and data-testid='register-logo' - PASSED
UI Test 4: Register page logo image loads correctly (naturalWidth > 0) - PASSED
UI Test 5: Organizer dashboard loads successfully after login - PASSED
UI Test 6: Stats section visible (8 Événements, 29 Participants, 945€ Revenus) - PASSED
UI Test 7: Export CSV/PDF section with date filters present - PASSED
UI Test 8: Events displayed as 3-column animated card grid (not table) - 8 cards found - PASSED
UI Test 9: Each card has image with status badge and date overlay - PASSED
UI Test 10: Each card has fill gauge with percentage (progress bar) - PASSED
UI Test 11: Each card has revenue badge - PASSED
UI Test 12: Manage button (data-testid='manage-event-{id}') present and links to /organizer/event/{id} - PASSED
UI Test 13: Check-in button (data-testid='checkin-event-{id}') present and links to /organizer/checkin/{id} - PASSED
UI Test 14: Results button (data-testid='results-event-{id}') present and links to /results/{id} - PASSED
UI Test 15: Edit button (data-testid='edit-event-{id}') present - PASSED
UI Test 16: Delete button (data-testid='delete-event-{id}') present - PASSED
UI Test 17: Manage button click navigates to event management page correctly - PASSED
UI Test 18: 'Nouvel événement' button present and opens create event dialog - PASSED
UI Test 19: Create event dialog form has all fields (title, sport type, date, location, participants max, price, distances, elevation, image upload, description) - PASSED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12: Verified SportLyo logo replacement and organizer dashboard redesign. 1) Login page (/login) now shows SportLyo logo image at /logo-auth.png with data-testid='login-logo' instead of old 'SC' text. 2) Register page (/register) also shows SportLyo logo image at /logo-auth.png with data-testid='register-logo'. 3) Organizer dashboard (/organizer) now displays events as a 3-column animated card grid (framer-motion) instead of a table. Each card includes: image, status badge (ACTIF/ANNULÉ), date overlay, revenue badge, event title, location (MapPin icon), fill gauge with percentage, and 5 action buttons (Gérer → /organizer/event/{id}, Check-in → /organizer/checkin/{id}, Résultats → /results/{id}, Modifier, Supprimer). Stats section shows events, participants, revenues at top. Export CSV/PDF section still functional.
features_verified: Logo image on /login page (replaced 'SC' div with img src='/logo-auth.png')
Logo image on /register page (replaced 'SC' div with img src='/logo-auth.png')
Card elements: image, status badge, date, location, fill gauge percentage, revenue
Action buttons: Gérer, Check-in, Résultats, Modifier, Supprimer
